---
title: "brute_force.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\brute_force.js"
loc: 32
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.67
style_score: 8.95
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 7.27
---

## Intent
The `brute_force.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on forceFix, content, gravity, search, socket, parser, pathReg. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via forceFix, content, gravity, search, socket, parser, pathReg. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `forceFix`
- `content`
- `gravity`
- `search`
- `socket`
- `parser`
- `pathReg`
